case_title: VANIAN LARA JENIFER VS LEWIS MARK AKA SPAGHETTI & RAVIOLI PROJECT INT'L et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $100.00 FILED BY VANIAN LARA JENIFER AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS MARK AKA SPAGHETTI & RAVIOLI PROJECT INT'L RAMIRO DEVIN AKA SPAGHETTI & RAVIOLI PROJECT INT'L ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIRO DEVIN AKA SPAGHETTI & RAVIOLI PROJECT INT'L
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS MARK AKA SPAGHETTI & RAVIOLI PROJECT INT'L

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VANIAN LARA JENIFER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEWIS MARK AKA SPAGHETTI & RAVIOLI PROJECT INT'L RAMIRO DEVIN AKA SPAGHETTI & RAVIOLI PROJECT INT'L $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $45.00, PLFT TO PAY DEFT ADDITIONAL $13.66 AND DEFT IS TO GET ALL HAIR THAT WAS ORDERED IN HER BEHALF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
